channel.title: Julius Darang
channel.description: Power Systems Engineer · Writing about systems, AI, and building a meaningful technical career.

item.title: Why the Visayas Grid is the most interesting engineering problem in the Philippines
item.description: An isolated island grid, aggressive renewable targets, and aging infrastructure — this is what makes the Visayas one of the most complex power systems in Southeast Asia.

item.title: How I use AI agents to automate 80% of my content workflow without losing my voice
item.description: AI workflow automation for content creation while maintaining authentic voice.

item.title: The engineer who writes: why technical credibility is the unfair advantage nobody talks about
item.description: Why writing about technical work builds credibility and opens doors.

item.title: Systems thinking is a way of life, not just an engineering methodology
item.description: Applying systems thinking beyond engineering to life and career decisions.

item.title: The polymath's stack: how I manage two careers without burning out
item.description: Balancing engineering work with writing and content creation.
